title: Single Sign-On
description: Let operators sign in with your existing identity provider. Supports any OIDC- or SAML2-compliant IdP.
setupDescription: Let operators sign in with your existing identity provider. Start with a provider preset, or configure manually.
statusDescription: Enable or disable SSO authentication for your instance.
protocolDescription: Pick your authentication protocol and enter the credentials from your identity provider.
presetsHint: We'll fill in the discovery URL — you just edit the tenant or realm.
oidcClientIdHint: The client or application ID your IdP issued for Qarote.
clientSecretKeepPlaceholder: Leave empty to keep current secret
samlMetadataUrlHint: The metadata XML endpoint from your SAML IdP.
urls: Register these URLs at your IdP
urlsDescription: Copy these callback URLs into your identity provider so it knows where to send users after authentication.
registerInIdP: Add the following to your IdP configuration:
domainHint: Users signing in with this domain will be routed to your SSO provider.
discoveryUrlRequired: Enter an OIDC Discovery URL first
deleteConfirm: Delete SSO provider? This will disable SSO for all users.
